items.name: cua
items.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

items.name: AgentBench
items.description: A Comprehensive Benchmark to Evaluate LLMs as Agents (ICLR'24)

items.name: mlflow
items.description: The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

items.name: haystack
items.description: Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing, memory, and generation. Built for scalable agents, RAG, multimodal applications, semantic search, and

items.name: promptfoo
items.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.  Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.name: agentmemory
items.description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

items.name: adk-python
items.description: An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

items.name: opik
items.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

items.name: evals
items.description: Evals is a framework for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems, and an open-source registry of benchmarks.

items.name: RagaAI-Catalyst
items.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

items.name: WeKnora
items.description: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.
